/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Window.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Window.dir/src/Application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Window.dir/src/FSWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Window.dir/src/Hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Window.dir/src/Main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Window.dir/src/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Window.dir/src/Scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Window.dir/src/Vector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Window.dir/src/Win32Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Window.dir/src/XlibWindow.cpp.o -o bin/Release-x64/Window  -lX11
